name: manual_515ee8
claim: When the user provides exact code snippets in their plan, implement them exactly as written — do not rewrite, optimize, or substitute equivalent expressions. Deviating from explicit user code introduces subtle bugs and erodes trust.

decisions.notes: Victor provided exact price formatting code using (price / 100).toFixed(2) in JSX. Agent substituted with a pre-divided variable and toLocaleString, introducing a double-division bug that made all product prices appear under a dollar.

rationale: Victor provided exact price formatting code using (price / 100).toFixed(2) in JSX. Agent substituted with a pre-divided variable and toLocaleString, introducing a double-division bug that made all product prices appear under a dollar.
